title: OX16 3UU, Barry Callebaut Manufacturing (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/KP3333QJ/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Barry Callebaut Manufacturing (UK) Limited Installation name: Barry Callebaut Banbury Permit number: EPR/KP3333QJ  "
